internal_issues.description: FLAGGED FOR VERDICT REVIEW paragraph in detail_verdict_text: legitimate-novelty carve-out Condition 1 already known-false (derives_from_dome=false). Same paragraph also in WIN-003 and WIN-011.
Kuhlke (2010) cited from JSE (fringe/anomalistics venue), contradicting our source hygiene standards. Removed; dual-field-approach content attributed to Bruhn.
CUORE described as "cryogenic neutrino detection" — corrected to "neutrinoless double-beta decay search".
tldr_evidence "multiple physicists" unsupported after Kuhlke removal. Updated to Bruhn-specific attribution.
WIN-015 defense_survives=3. Best surviving defense: Jackson §9.1 defines near-field zone but does not compute coupling magnitude. Routed to analyst as EXP-168 (category: defense).
Missing back-of-envelope M = µ₀·N₁N₂A₁A₂/(4πd³) near-field coupling calculation. Routed to analyst as EXP-169.
FLAGGED FOR VERDICT REVIEW paragraph in WIN-003 detail_verdict_text — same boilerplate as WIN-015, derives_from_dome=false. Removed.
FLAGGED FOR VERDICT REVIEW paragraph in WIN-011 detail_verdict_text — same boilerplate as WIN-015, derives_from_dome=false. Removed.
